name: Ufff... Yeh Love Hai Mushkil
overview: Kairi, a determined young woman raising her three siblings, clashes with Yug Sinha, a lawyer skeptical of women and scarred by his past. What begins as a fierce rivalry, with the two clashing at home and in court, soon turns into an unexpected journey of love, healing, and redefining family.
